creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to matt from comment #2)

I thought I posted a PR about this a while ago as well, but apparently not?

This definitely breaks www/rt42 and was a major source of upgrade pain. Every time packages were updated we had to be careful if mod_perl2 was touched so we could fix httpd.conf before restarting services.

Very annoying.
